root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as memname, --pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname, pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth) as age_mem , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '9' ) as loan_bal_9 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '2' ) as loan_bal_2 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '4' ) as loan_bal_4 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '6' ) as loan_bal_6 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '8' ) as loan_bal_8 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '3' ) as loan_bal_3 , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_stock
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '011000' and '011007' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
